Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 221 

OTH_WVR_TYPE_MOS 

LABEL: Other Waiver Type Months 

DESCRIPTION: Number of months the beneficiary was enrolled in any other type of waiver in the calendar year 

SHORT NAME: OTH_WVR_TYPE_MOS 

LONG NAME: OTH_WVR_TYPE_MOS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): Waiver 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0–12 (Number of months)
